evidence.title: Derivation and independent validation of kidneyintelX.dkd: A prognostic test for the assessment of diabetic kidney disease progression.
Derivation and validation of a machine learning risk score using biomarker and electronic patient data to predict progression of diabetic kidney disease.

denovo_summary.clinical_study_summary: clinical data, which are provided by a patient's physician via a test requisition form (urine albumin creatinine ratio [uACn hemoglobin A 1 c [HbA 1 c], and Blood Urea Nitrogen [BUN]). The algorithm generates a risk level (Low, Moderate, or High) for progressive decline in kidney function, defined as sustained decrease (<40% of baseline value) in eGFR. The KidneyIntelX.dkd algorithm was modeled using machine learning (Random Forest) to identify and analyze risk factors for kidney disease progres
